tasks.title: Update .github/dependabot.yml with Docker ecosystem
tasks.description: Add Docker package-ecosystem to dependabot config alongside existing github-actions entry.
acceptance_criteria: dependabot.yml has both github-actions and docker ecosystems

tasks.title: Fix .github/FUNDING.yml syntax to array format
tasks.description: Change github: paruff to github: [paruff] to match GitHub FUNDING.yml array format.

tasks.title: Create CHANGELOG.md
tasks.description: Create root CHANGELOG.md in Keep a Changelog v1.1.0 format with entries for v0.1.0 covering all work to date.
acceptance_criteria: v0.1.0 section with entries for all merged features

tasks.title: Verify CODEOWNERS exists
tasks.description: Confirm .github/CODEOWNERS exists with * @paruff. No changes needed — already correct.

tasks.title: Apply v0.1.0 tag
tasks.description: Create annotated git tag v0.1.0 on main HEAD and push to GitHub.

tasks.title: Create good-first-issue label and apply to issues
tasks.description: Create good-first-issue label on GitHub. Find 3-5 well-scoped open issues and apply the label.

tasks.title: Validate: yamllint, markdownlint, unit tests
tasks.description: Run yamllint on YAML files, markdownlint on CHANGELOG.md, and run full unit test suite.
